governanceNotice: Governance change: modifying this file changes the structured gate-policy authority. Ordinary implementation tasks must not change it without task/ADR/decision evidence.

categoryDefinitions.boundary: Guards an architecture or package boundary invariant. Architecture review may cite this category as boundary evidence.
categoryDefinitions.local-consistency: Guards local formatting, mirrored declarations, generated/help text, or repository-local coherence. This category is useful but is not boundary evidence.
categoryDefinitions.smoke: Runs an end-to-end smoke or packaging/build smoke.
categoryDefinitions.release-policy: Guards release, package, supply-chain, runtime readiness, or publication policy.
categoryDefinitions.meta-governance: Guards governance surfaces such as PR body format, aggregate check composition, or CI gate topology.

tierDefinitions.pr-required: Runs in a GitHub branch-protection required context for pull requests.
tierDefinitions.main-only: Does not run in a PR required context; runs through full-check on main push, scheduled nightly, and manual workflow dispatch unless noted.
tierDefinitions.manual-only: Runs only by explicit local or workflow-dispatch invocation.

gates.tierReason: Full aggregate check is intentionally not a pull_request job; rewrite-ci runs it on main push, schedule, and workflow_dispatch.
consumerScope: full local gate suite
non-PR rewrite-ci full-check matrix

allowlistPolicy.notes: Aggregate composition is governed by this manifest and package.json until G3 derives/checks it.

gates.tierReason: Local PR approximation script is not invoked by rewrite-ci; GitHub PRs use tiered jobs instead.
consumerScope: local PR approximation command

allowlistPolicy.notes: Aggregate composition is governed by this manifest and package.json until G3 derives/checks it.

consumerScope: GitHub pull request body

allowlistPolicy.notes: No human-authored PR allowlist; PR body must satisfy the bilingual template contract. Mergify merge-queue verification PRs are narrowly skipped when authored by mergify[bot], using a mergify/merge-queue/* head ref, and carrying the Mergify queue payload marker.

consumerScope: GitHub pull request changed-file paths
GitHub pull request governance declaration body section
manifest-derived protected governance surfaces

allowlistPolicy.notes: Break-glass is declared in the PR body only for urgent main recovery and must record reason, scope, and a follow-up governance task. The checker verifies declaration shape and references, not semantic truth.

gates.command: echo "Mergify queue metadata edit does not change the source under test."
consumerScope: Mergify synthetic merge-queue pull_request edited events for mergify/merge-queue/* branches

allowlistPolicy.notes: This is not a human-authored PR bypass. It only lets required jobs complete quickly for Mergify synthetic queue PR body or metadata edits after source checks already ran for the queue head.

consumerScope: TypeScript project references

allowlistPolicy.notes: TypeScript diagnostics are fail-closed.

consumerScope: repository JavaScript and TypeScript lint surface
GUI renderer import boundary: renderer must consume window.harness bridge only
GUI IPC primitive placement: ipcMain.handle and ipcRenderer stay in their approved Electron files
kernel/application production-source physical I/O import boundary: fs/fs/promises/child_process imports are rejected outside explicit port implementation debt files

allowlistPolicy.notes: Kernel deep-import known debt and W3 port physical-I/O file exceptions are externalized from eslint.config.mjs; ESLint imports these modules directly and each entry carries decision/task plus reason evidence.

gates.tierReason: PR workflow runs the node test tiers separately through fast-contract and integration; the aggregate npm test command only runs through full-check.
consumerScope: all node:test suites registered by the node test runner

allowlistPolicy.notes: Test tier registration is fail-closed by the runner.

consumerScope: node:test suites classified as fast

allowlistPolicy.notes: Tier registration is explicit and fail-closed.

consumerScope: node:test suites classified as contract
GUI bridge static lock: API registry shipped/deferred methods, preload allowlist, and registered IPC channels stay aligned

allowlistPolicy.notes: Tier registration is explicit and fail-closed.

consumerScope: node:test suites classified as integration

allowlistPolicy.notes: Tier registration is explicit and fail-closed.

consumerScope: GUI tests registered by the GUI test runner

allowlistPolicy.notes: GUI lane no-ops expensive steps when path filtering reports no GUI/shared-root changes.

consumerScope: @harness-anything/gui build artifact

allowlistPolicy.notes: Build smoke has no allowlist.

gates.tierReason: decision/dec_mrat10bn: headed GUI E2E tests run only by explicit local invocation; headless GitHub CI has low signal and previously caused merge-queue hangs.
consumerScope: Explicit local GUI task closeout evidence via npm run test:gui:e2e
GUI related task closeout must run this local E2E entry and attach evidence; it is not part of GitHub CI or check:local.

allowlistPolicy.notes: dec_mrat10bn: GUI related task closeout must run the local GUI E2E command and attach evidence. This is enforced by task closeout discipline, not by GitHub CI, check:local, or branch protection.

gates.command: npm run typecheck && npm run test:fast && npm run test:contract
consumerScope: Node 26 compatibility for typecheck plus fast and contract tests

allowlistPolicy.notes: No compatibility allowlist is declared.

consumerScope: repository source file size and structural thresholds

allowlistPolicy.notes: Current exceptions live in the checker; ADR-0023 D6 requires governed treatment for allowlist growth.

consumerScope: CLI source structure

allowlistPolicy.notes: Any structural exception in the checker is a governance-controlled gate change.

consumerScope: packages/kernel/src/store/write-journal-coordinator.ts imports and local calls
metabolic write-admissibility policy modules named by ADR-0022 F6

allowlistPolicy.notes: Existing hard-delete disposition checks inside WriteCoordinator are explicit F6 debt. New metabolic policy imports or calls fail unless separately governed.

consumerScope: AST-classified fs write calls in packages/kernel/src/store, packages/adapters/local/src, and packages/cli/src/commands
ADR-0016 D1 bypass write channel closure and explicit exemption registry

allowlistPolicy.notes: W8 seals bypass fs writes with a structural AST rule; allowlist entries must cite explicit W8 channel classification or C0 coordinator internals.

consumerScope: non-test imports from packages/** and tools/** into packages/kernel/src/**
kernel public barrel export symbols from packages/kernel/src/index.ts

allowlistPolicy.notes: F8a first pass externalizes the existing zero-consumption kernel barrel export baseline; future zero-consumption exports fail unless explicitly governed.

consumerScope: entity relation graph cycle detection over RelationGraphEdgeRow / EntityRelationRecord surfaces
non-test packages/** and tools/** source files

allowlistPolicy.notes: The canonical entity relation cycle substrate is packages/kernel/src/projection/relation-graph-projection.ts#detectRelationGraphCycles; wrappers must delegate to it.

gates.tierReason: ADR-0022 D4 requires overdue enforcement debt visibility in nightly full-check without turning stale governance debt into a pull-request required merge blocker.
consumerScope: private harness/decisions decision-package relations derives -> task/*
private harness/tasks task-package lifecycle status projection from INDEX.md
scheduled rewrite-ci full-check only

allowlistPolicy.notes: This checker is read-only over authored private harness markdown. It skips public-only checkouts where harness/ is absent.
